$comment: FC7 (D-FC7-NESTED-STRUCT-FIELD): nested brace initializer { { pick(10), pick(20) }, pick(12) } recurses element-wise into the struct-typed field's sub-slot. pick() is a non-inlined identity so the init values are runtime (fold-resistant). 10+20+12=42. Revert the nested-init recursion → the inner field never stores → off 42.
